narrative:
Elkrun Twp township has 1,320 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
